title: astracantha eriocephala
intro: Astracantha eriocephala, also known as the spiny thistle or crepis, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Astracantha eriocephala can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
